required.title: Welcome!
required.username_help: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores (3-20 characters). No spaces or hyphens allowed.

errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again

validation.no_spaces: Username cannot contain spaces. Use underscore (_) instead.
validation.no_hyphens: Username cannot contain hyphens (-). Use underscore (_) instead.
validation.invalid_chars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscore (_)
validation.min_length: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.max_length: Username must be at most 20 characters
